user.title: BToddB HA Music
user.description: Configure JSON mappings. Speaker values are music_assistant media_player entity ids (a string, or a list to target several). Radio station and playlist values are Music Assistant URIs (e.g. radiobrowser://radio/... or spotify://playlist/...).

error.invalid_mapping: Enter a valid JSON object. Speaker values can be a string or list of strings; radio station and playlist values must be strings.

abort.already_configured: BToddB HA Music is already configured.

init.title: BToddB HA Music options
init.description: Update JSON mappings. Speaker values are music_assistant media_player entity ids (a string, or a list to target several). Radio station and playlist values are Music Assistant URIs (e.g. radiobrowser://radio/... or spotify://playlist/...).

error.invalid_mapping: Enter a valid JSON object. Speaker values can be a string or list of strings; radio station and playlist values must be strings.
